200.q: What accident gives Barry Allen his powers?
200.a: A particle accelerator explosion and lightning strike

What villain name does Cisco give Eobard Thawne?

Who is Barry Allen?
200.a: A forensic scientist who gains super-speed after being struck by lightning during a particle accelerator explosion

200.q: What is STAR Labs?
200.a: The scientific facility where Barry's team helps him fight metahumans

200.q: Who is Iris West?
200.a: Barry's love interest and eventual wife — a journalist

200.q: What is the Speed Force?
200.a: The energy dimension that powers all speedsters

200.q: Who is the Reverse Flash?
200.a: Eobard Thawne — a future villain who killed Barry's mother

200.q: Who plays Barry Allen?
Who is Cisco Ramon?
200.a: A STAR Labs engineer who names the metahumans — later revealed to be the meta Vibe

200.q: Who is Caitlin Snow?
200.a: A STAR Labs scientist who eventually develops cold powers and becomes Killer Frost

200.q: What city does Barry protect?
Who is Harrison Wells?
200.a: The identity used by Reverse Flash while secretly mentoring Barry

400.q: Who is Barry's main season 1 enemy revealed to be a reverse speedster?
What is Barry's altered timeline event called?
What is Caitlin Snow's icy alter ego called?
Who becomes the stretchy hero Elongated Man?
What is Cisco Ramon's brother named?
What speedster from Earth-2 becomes Barry's ally and Wally's love interest?
What scientist becomes Killer Frost?
What nickname does Cisco give Barry?
What metahuman prison sits beneath STAR Labs?
What villain controls the city from the shadows using dark matter and mind games in season 6A?
What codename does Nora West-Allen use?
What alias does Cisco use as a hero?
What giant psychic gorilla becomes one of Barry's enemies?
What villain uses cold guns?
What is Joe West's job?
What giant gorilla attacks Central City?
What scientist creates the Thinking Cap arc?
What villain is also called Bloodwork?
What prison houses metahumans in the city?
What is the source of Barry Allen's powers?
What company built the particle accelerator?
What icy identity does Caitlin become?
What is Flashpoint?
400.a: Barry travels back in time to save his mother — creating an alternate timeline with catastrophic consequences

400.q: Who is Zoom?
400.a: Hunter Zolomon — a serial killer from Earth-2 who steals Barry's speed

400.q: What is the Multiverse in The Flash?
400.a: Multiple parallel Earths — the show heavily uses Earth-2 and other Earths from the beginning

400.q: Who is Savitar?
400.a: A time remnant of Barry Allen who becomes evil after being rejected by his team

400.q: What is the significance of the newspaper headline?
400.a: A future newspaper predicts the Flash vanishes in a crisis — a recurring plot thread

400.q: Who is Kid Flash?
400.a: Wally West — Iris's brother who gains speed powers and becomes Barry's partner

400.q: What is the Crisis on Infinite Earths crossover?
400.a: A massive Arrowverse event where Barry apparently sacrifices himself — but survives with a new power level

400.q: Who is Godspeed?
400.a: August Heart — a villain speedster who appears in later seasons

400.q: What is the significance of Barry's ring?
400.a: The ring contains his compressed Flash suit — a nod to the comics

400.q: Who is Joe West?
400.a: Barry's adoptive father and police detective — the emotional anchor of the show

600.q: What is the name of Barry and Iris's daughter from the future?
What villain is known as the god of speed?
What speedster title does Wally West use?
What is Cicada's real name?
What is the mirror villain's name in season 6?
What does Savitar turn out to be?
600.a: A time remnant of Barry Allen

600.q: What is Zoom's real name?
What is Reverse-Flash's real name?
What does Savitar turn out to be?
What future headline haunts Barry for years?
What force powers Nora and Bart?
What is Caitlin's mother's surname?
What speedster villain is Barry's daughter from the future hunted by?
What prison does Eobard Thawne manipulate events from in season 5?
What force counterpart opposes the Speed Force in season 7?
What is the first metahuman Barry captures called?
What is Barry and Iris's daughter from the future called?
What scientist first merges with Ronnie as Firestorm?
What villain hunts metas with a lightning-shaped dagger scar?
What AI guides Barry from the future in the lab?
What is Reverse-Flash's real name?
What is Zoom's real name?
What alternate Earth is Harrison Wells from originally?
What is the name of the alternate Earth's dark version of Flash?
Who created Zoom's time remnants storyline actor?
What artificial speed drug nearly kills speedsters?
What event names Barry the Paragon of Love?
What is the paradox of Reverse Flash?
600.a: Thawne's hatred of Barry creates Barry's motivation to become the Flash — a temporal loop with no beginning

600.q: What is the Black Flash?
600.a: The embodiment of death for speedsters — it hunts aberrant speedsters

600.q: What is the Speed Force prison?
600.a: A prison made of Speed Force energy — Jay Garrick was trapped there for decades

600.q: What is the significance of Barry dying in the comics Crisis?
600.a: In the 1985 comic he runs himself to death destroying the Anti-Monitor's weapon — the definitive hero sacrifice

600.q: What is Negative Speed Force?
600.a: An anti-Speed Force created by Thawne — the source of the Negative Reverse Flash's red lightning

600.q: What is the significance of the tachyon device?
600.a: It allows Barry to temporarily achieve speeds beyond his normal limits — used to fight Zoom

600.q: Who is the Spectre and what is Barry's role?
600.a: In Crisis, Ollie Queen becomes the Spectre — Barry becomes the Paragon of Love

600.q: What is the stillness of the future?
600.a: A concept in later seasons — the moment where all speed stops, revealing a fundamental truth about the Speed Force

600.q: What makes The Flash unique in the Arrowverse?
600.a: It introduced the Multiverse concept to the Arrowverse — and its tone is the lightest and most optimistic

600.q: Who is the original Flash Jay Garrick?
600.a: The Golden Age Flash from Earth-3 — he becomes a mentor to Barry
